'''âp-th-sh''' ('''pathasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocoder|vocoder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocoder|vocoder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-th-sh
|-
! Lemma
| pathasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathashithi|pathashithi]] || [[word:pathashiji|pathashiji]] || [[word:pathashishi|pathashishi]] || [[word:pathashi|pathashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathashuthuth|pathashuthuth]] || [[word:pathashujuj|pathashujuj]] || [[word:pathashushush|pathashushush]] || [[word:pathash|pathash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathashuthu|pathashuthu]] || [[word:pathashuju|pathashuju]] || [[word:pathashushu|pathashushu]] || [[word:pathashu|pathashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathashufuth|pathashufuth]] || [[word:pathashufuj|pathashufuj]] || [[word:pathashufush|pathashufush]] || [[word:pathashuf|pathashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathashethe|pathashethe]] || [[word:pathasheje|pathasheje]] || [[word:pathasheshe|pathasheshe]] || [[word:pathashe|pathashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathashothoth|pathashothoth]] || [[word:pathashojoj|pathashojoj]] || [[word:pathashoshosh|pathashoshosh]] || [[word:pathash|pathash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathashotho|pathashotho]] || [[word:pathashojo|pathashojo]] || [[word:pathashosho|pathashosho]] || [[word:pathasho|pathasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathashofoth|pathashofoth]] || [[word:pathashofoj|pathashofoj]] || [[word:pathashofosh|pathashofosh]] || [[word:pathashof|pathashof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathashĂŻfĂŻf|pathashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻfĂŻf|pathashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻfĂŻf|pathashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻfĂŻf|pathashĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]] || [[word:pathashĂŻf|pathashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathashĂŠthĂŠ|pathashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pathashĂŠjĂŠ|pathashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pathashĂŠshĂŠ|pathashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pathashĂŠ|pathashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathashathath|pathashathath]] || [[word:pathashajaj|pathashajaj]] || [[word:pathashashash|pathashashash]] || [[word:pathash|pathash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathashatha|pathashatha]] || [[word:pathashaja|pathashaja]] || [[word:pathashasha|pathashasha]] || [[word:pathasha|pathasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathashafath|pathashafath]] || [[word:pathashafaj|pathashafaj]] || [[word:pathashafash|pathashafash]] || [[word:pathashaf|pathashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pathashasha|pathashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopathashasha|gopathashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipathashasha|gokipathashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pathashnĂŒsha|pathashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopathashnknĂŒsha|gopathashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipathashnĂŒsha|gokipathashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pathashshĂ«sha|pathashshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopathashnkshĂ«sha|gopathashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipathashshĂ«sha|gokipathashshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathashrosha|pathashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathashnkrosha|gopathashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathashrosha|gokipathashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pathashmusha|pathashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathashnkmusha|gopathashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathashmusha|gokipathashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pathashsherasha|pathashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopathashnksherasha|gopathashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipathashsherasha|gokipathashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pathashngasha|pathashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopathashnkngasha|gopathashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipathashngasha|gokipathashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pathashyasha|pathashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopathashnkyasha|gopathashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipathashyasha|gokipathashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pathashyamasha|pathashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopathashnkyamasha|gopathashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipathashyamasha|gokipathashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathashnĂŒshĂ«sha|pathashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopathashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipathashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathashnĂŒrosha|pathashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathashnknĂŒrosha|gopathashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathashnĂŒrosha|gokipathashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathashnĂŒmusha|pathashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathashnknĂŒmusha|gopathashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathashnĂŒmusha|gokipathashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathashshĂ«nĂŒsha|pathashshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopathashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathashshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipathashshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathashshĂ«rosha|pathashshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathashnkshĂ«rosha|gopathashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathashshĂ«rosha|gokipathashshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathashshĂ«musha|pathashshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathashnkshĂ«musha|gopathashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathashshĂ«musha|gokipathashshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathashronĂŒsha|pathashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathashnkronĂŒsha|gopathashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathashronĂŒsha|gokipathashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathashroshĂ«sha|pathashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathashnkroshĂ«sha|gopathashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathashroshĂ«sha|gokipathashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathashromusha|pathashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathashnkromusha|gopathashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathashromusha|gokipathashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathashmunĂŒsha|pathashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathashnkmunĂŒsha|gopathashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathashmunĂŒsha|gokipathashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathashmushĂ«sha|pathashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathashnkmushĂ«sha|gopathashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathashmushĂ«sha|gokipathashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathashmurosha|pathashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathashnkmurosha|gopathashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathashmurosha|gokipathashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pathash|pathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠsh|pĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopathash|hopathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠthĂŠsh|hopĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopathash|hohopathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠthĂŠsh|hohopĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpathash|nĂŒpathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠthĂŠsh|nĂŒpĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpathash|nĂŒnĂŒpathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠthĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpathash|nĂŻpathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠthĂŠsh|nĂŻpĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpathash|nĂŻnĂŻpathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠthĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupathash|lupathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠthĂŠsh|lupĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupathash|lulupathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠthĂŠsh|lulupĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipathash|lipathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠthĂŠsh|lipĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipathash|lilipathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠthĂŠsh|lilipĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopathash|kopathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠthĂŠsh|kopĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopathash|kokopathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠthĂŠsh|kokopĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepathash|kepathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠthĂŠsh|kepĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepathash|kekepathash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠthĂŠsh|kekepĂŠthĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
